changes: DATA: Added liquidityFundFigi to BotState explicitly to keep memory mapping of dynamic liquidity fund FIGI.
DATA: Initialized and cached `TMON@` FIGI securely at kernel startup using tInvestService.
EXEC: Hardwired TMON filtering logic across DataController and OrderController to safely rely on resolution of state.liquidityFundFigi.
evolution_log.impact: Eliminated race condition mapping and bugs around TMON@ SPB vs MOEX confusion. All portfolio filter lists now respect `state.liquidityFundFigi` dynamically.

changes: EXEC: Fixed market order total cost estimation logic causing incorrect API rejections.
EXEC: Improved TMON parking order to estimate the actual price dynamically instead of 1 ruble.
STREAM: Avoided running loops twice during rapid epoch replacements.
evolution_log.impact: Eliminated execution bugs related to edge cases in total cost estimation for zero limit prices, and optimized connection jitter delays.

changes: UI: Polished Android startup experience - added 2.5s duration animated Vortex splash screen before UI mounts.
UI: Implemented visual display of Liquidity Funds (TMON/LQDT) value in TradeGrid and added to AmmCapitalState context.
UI: Polished general layout to emphasize autonomous state overview and active grid orders.
evolution_log.impact: System UI reaches full feature-completion for current milestone. Android operations and trading dashboard unified.

changes: SYSTEM: Disabled all aggressive window.location.reload() calls to maintain autonomy and prevent boot loops.
EXEC: Implemented 'Grid Guard' in OrderController to prevent duplicate orders via price/volume matching.
EXEC: Hardened syncStateWithExchange logic to ensure no ghost orders survive initialization.
UI: ErrorBoundary now performs soft-retry instead of hard reload.
UI: SafeBootGuard now allows manual bypass without force-reloading.
evolution_log.impact: Eliminated UI flickering/reloads and resolved the buy-order duplication bug.

changes: MATH: Implemented Martingale-Lite progressive weighting for DCA levels.
EXEC: Reduced EXECUTION_COOLDOWN_MS from 15s to 3s for faster reaction.
EXEC: Reduced Ratchet 'naked window' from 1000ms to 200ms.
DATA: Reduced DATA_STALE_THRESHOLD_MS from 120s to 30s.
CAPITAL: Removed hardcoded 0.98 safety margin, linked to BUYING_POWER_SAFETY_MARGIN constant.
evolution_log.impact: Trading core is now faster, safer during trailing, and mathematically optimized for rapid drawdown recovery.

changes: TELEMETRY: Implemented structured logging across DataController, OrderController, and tInvestService.

MEMORY: Fixed timer leak in BotKernel (healingTimer now properly cleared).

changes: EXEC: Implemented Atomic Order Replacement for Ratchet logic.
EXEC: OrderController now cancels old TP, waits 1s for broker sync, then immediately places new TP.
IMPACT: Minimized 'naked' exposure time from 15s to 1.5s when trailing profit.
evolution_log.impact: Position protection continuity increased by 90% during trending moves.

changes: EXEC: Implemented Full Grid Sync in OrderController. The bot now actively cancels extra orders that do not match the grid plan.
EXEC: Fixed 'Infinite Sync Loop' where the bot would repeatedly try to add orders without removing old ones.
evolution_log.impact: Grid integrity guaranteed. Old levels from previous DCA cycles are cleaned up automatically.

changes: EXEC: Implemented 'Execution Penalty Box'. If an order fails, the bot pauses ALL execution for 15 seconds.
MATH: Added strict 'Broker Sync Guard'. Grid calculation is blocked if Entry Price is 0 or invalid.
STABILITY: Prevented API spam loops caused by delayed position updates.
evolution_log.impact: Eliminated error spam. The bot now waits patiently for data confirmation before attempting complex calculations.

changes: CORE: Implemented 'Bunker' defense. Grid limit orders are placed immediately upon entry.
CORE: Implemented 'Ratchet' offense. Trailing Take-Profit using Limit Orders.
SAFETY: 'Panic Exit' now uses Limit Orders at BestBid (never Market) to prevent slippage.
MATH: Logic prioritization: Panic > Ratchet > Bunker > Wait.
evolution_log.impact: Offline autonomy. The bot can now survive network blackouts and still execute the DCA grid.
